offline_subset_search.interpretation: Exploratory only. The balanced subset used all 24 answers; the two 12-case blocks partitioned mechanism types and therefore were not interchangeable validation folds.

diagnosis: The constructive 15-prompt plurality selected every case for which any of the 30 prompts generated the exact answer.
Adding the second 15 prompts changed one correct plurality into an error, so more prompt arms were not automatically beneficial.
Eight cases had no exact candidate. Generation, not selection, was the dominant bottleneck on this cycle.
Post-hoc failure shapes were three modular recurrences, two growing-block sequences, and one each involving lagged, interleaved, and periodic-difference structure.
The 66.7% result is promising exploration, not a validated estimate.
infrastructure_note: The first sandboxed launch stopped before model initialization because Codex CLI could not write its state database. Its failed artifacts were preserved under runs/exploration/wide-01. The exact registered batch was then run once outside the sandbox under wide-01-rerun-01; all 60 model jobs completed on their first attempt.
